method_summary: Uses Physics-Informed Neural Network residuals as cellwise indicators for adaptive mesh refinement in finite-difference PDE solvers
key_innovation: Transferring physics-informed diagnostic information from PINNs into finite-difference mesh adaptation
best_result: PINN-threshold refinement achieves relative L² error 0.021067 with 60 degrees of freedom, compared to 0.022617 for uniform refinement with 192 degrees of freedom
limitations_stated: Gradient indicator remains slightly more accurate
PINN residuals don't consistently outperform gradient or uniform baselines in 2D/3D tests
title: Physics-Informed Residuals for Adaptive Mesh Refinement in Finite-Difference PDE Solvers
